      GuardrailFailClosed GuardrailFailurePolicy = "fail_closed"
      GuardrailFailOpen   GuardrailFailurePolicy = "fail_open"

      LifecycleRun       LifecycleOperation = "run"

  func NewReadonlyState(values map[string]any) ReadonlyState
  type Agent interface {
      Name() string
      Run(Context) iter.Seq2[*session.Event, error]
  }
  type AgentFactory interface {
      NewAgent(context.Context, AgentSpec) (Agent, error)
  }
  type AgentSpec struct {
      Name                      string         `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Model                     model.LLM      `json:"-"`
      Tools                     []tool.Tool    `json:"-"`
      SubagentRunner            SubagentRunner `json:"-"`
      Request                   ModelRequestOptions
      RequiredModelCapabilities model.Capabilities `json:"required_model_capabilities,omitempty"`
      Metadata                  map[string]any     `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
  }
  type ApprovalOption struct {
      ID   string `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Kind string `json:"kind,omitempty"`
  }
  type ApprovalRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      Session    session.Session    `json:"session"`
      RunID      string             `json:"run_id,omitempty"`
      TurnID     string             `json:"turn_id,omitempty"`

      PauseTokenID string                    `json:"pause_token_id,omitempty"`
      Tool         tool.Definition           `json:"tool"`
      Call         tool.Call                 `json:"call"`
      Approval     *session.ProtocolApproval `json:"approval,omitempty"`
      Metadata     map[string]any            `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
  }
  type ApprovalRequester interface {
      RequestApproval(context.Context, ApprovalRequest) (ApprovalResponse, error)
  }
  type ApprovalResolver interface {
      ResolveApproval(context.Context, ResolveApprovalRequest) error
  }
  type ApprovalResponse struct {
      Outcome    string `json:"outcome,omitempty"`
      OptionID   string `json:"option_id,omitempty"`
      Approved   bool   `json:"approved,omitempty"`
      Reason     string `json:"reason,omitempty"`
      ReviewText string `json:"review_text,omitempty"`
  }
  type AttachLiveRunRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      RunID      string             `json:"run_id"`
  }
  type AttachParticipantRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef      `json:"session_ref"`
      Agent      string                  `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Role       session.ParticipantRole `json:"role,omitempty"`
      Source     string                  `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Label      string                  `json:"label,omitempty"`
  }
  type CancelResult struct {
      Status CancelStatus `json:"status,omitempty"`
      Err    error        `json:"-"`
  }
  type CancelStatus string
  type Context interface {
      context.Context
      Session() session.Session
      Events() Events
      ReadonlyState() ReadonlyState
      DrainSubmissions() []Submission
      Overlay() bool
  }
  type ContextSpec struct {
      Context          context.Context
      Session          session.Session
      Events           []*session.Event
      State            map[string]any
      DrainSubmissions func() []Submission
      Overlay          bool
  }
  type ContextTransfer struct {
      Summary string        `json:"summary,omitempty"`
      Turns   []ContextTurn `json:"turns,omitempty"`
  }
  type ContextTurn struct {
      Executor         session.ActorRef `json:"executor,omitempty"`
      UserMessages     []string         `json:"user_messages,omitempty"`
      AssistantSummary string           `json:"assistant_summary,omitempty"`
  }
  type ContextUsage struct {
      CurrentTokens int `json:"current_tokens,omitempty"`
      MaxTokens     int `json:"max_tokens,omitempty"`
  }
  type ControllerEventForwardRequest struct {
      ActiveSession session.Session
      SessionRef    session.SessionRef

      MutationGuard session.MutationGuard
      TurnID        string
      Source        EventSource
      Publisher     SourceEventPublisher
      Normalize     EventNormalizer
      IsUserEcho    func(*session.Event) bool
  }
  type ControllerEventForwarder interface {
      ForwardControllerEvents(ctx context.Context, req ControllerEventForwardRequest) error
  }
  type DetachParticipantRequest struct {
      SessionRef    session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      ParticipantID string             `json:"participant_id,omitempty"`
      Source        string             `json:"source,omitempty"`
  }
  type EndpointApprovalToolCall struct {
      ID        string                            `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name      string                            `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Kind      string                            `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Title     string                            `json:"title,omitempty"`
      Status    string                            `json:"status,omitempty"`
      RawInput  map[string]any                    `json:"raw_input,omitempty"`
      RawOutput map[string]any                    `json:"raw_output,omitempty"`
      Content   []session.ProtocolToolCallContent `json:"content,omitempty"`
  }
  type EventNormalizer func(activeSession session.Session, turnID string, event *session.Event) *session.Event
  type EventSource interface {
      Events() iter.Seq2[*session.Event, error]
  }
  type Events interface {
      All() iter.Seq[*session.Event]
      Len() int
      At(int) *session.Event
  }
  type Guardrail interface {
      Name() string
      ApplyGuardrail(context.Context, GuardrailInput) (GuardrailInput, error)
  }
  type GuardrailFailurePolicy string
  type GuardrailInput struct {
      SessionRef   session.SessionRef  `json:"session_ref"`
      Input        string              `json:"input,omitempty"`
      DisplayInput string              `json:"display_input,omitempty"`
      ContentParts []model.ContentPart `json:"content_parts,omitempty"`
  }
  type GuardrailRejectionError struct {
      Guardrail string
      Reason    string
  }
  type GuardrailSpec struct {
      Guardrail Guardrail
      Timeout   time.Duration
      OnFailure GuardrailFailurePolicy
  }
  type HandoffControllerRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef     `json:"session_ref"`
      Kind       session.ControllerKind `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Agent      string                 `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Source     string                 `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Reason     string                 `json:"reason,omitempty"`
  }
  type LifecycleEvent struct {
      Operation  LifecycleOperation `json:"operation"`
      SessionRef session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      RunID      string             `json:"run_id,omitempty"`
      TurnID     string             `json:"turn_id,omitempty"`
      StepID     string             `json:"step_id,omitempty"`
      Name       string             `json:"name,omitempty"`
  }
  type LifecycleInterceptor interface {
      InterceptLifecycle(context.Context, LifecycleEvent, LifecycleNext) error
  }
  type LifecycleNext func(context.Context) error
  type LifecycleOperation string
  type LifecycleOptions struct {
      Interceptors []LifecycleInterceptor
      TraceSink    TraceSink
      Clock        func() time.Time
  }
  type LiveRunAttacher interface {
      AttachLiveRun(context.Context, AttachLiveRunRequest) (RunResult, error)
  }
  type ModelRequestOptions struct {
      Stream *bool             `json:"stream,omitempty"`
      Output *model.OutputSpec `json:"output,omitempty"`
  }
  type ParticipantControlPlane interface {
      AttachParticipant(context.Context, AttachParticipantRequest) (session.Session, error)
      PromptParticipant(context.Context, PromptParticipantRequest) (RunResult, error)
      DetachParticipant(context.Context, DetachParticipantRequest) (session.Session, error)
  }
  type PromptParticipantRequest struct {
      SessionRef        session.SessionRef  `json:"session_ref"`
      ParticipantID     string              `json:"participant_id,omitempty"`
      Input             string              `json:"input,omitempty"`
      DisplayInput      string              `json:"display_input,omitempty"`
      DisplayTitle      string              `json:"display_title,omitempty"`

      Source            string              `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Stream            bool                `json:"stream,omitempty"`
      ApprovalRequester ApprovalRequester   `json:"-"`
  }
  type ReadonlyState interface {
      Lookup(string) (any, bool)
      Snapshot() map[string]any
  }
  type ResolveApprovalRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      TokenID    string             `json:"token_id"`
      Decision   ApprovalResponse   `json:"decision"`
  }
  type RunConflictError struct {
      SessionRef  session.SessionRef
      ActiveRunID string
  }
  type RunLifecycleStatus string
  type RunNotAttachableError struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef
      RunID      string
      Detail     string
  }
  type RunRequest struct {
      SessionRef        session.SessionRef  `json:"session_ref"`
      Input             string              `json:"input,omitempty"`
      DisplayInput      string              `json:"display_input,omitempty"`
      ContentParts      []model.ContentPart `json:"content_parts,omitempty"`
      Request           ModelRequestOptions `json:"request,omitempty"`
      ApprovalRequester ApprovalRequester   `json:"-"`
      Agent             Agent               `json:"-"`
      AgentSpec         AgentSpec           `json:"-"`
  }
  type RunResult struct {
      Session session.Session `json:"session"`
      Handle  Runner          `json:"-"`
  }
  type RunState struct {
      Status          RunLifecycleStatus `json:"status,omitempty"`
      ActiveRunID     string             `json:"active_run_id,omitempty"`
      WaitingApproval bool               `json:"waiting_approval,omitempty"`
      PauseTokenID    string             `json:"pause_token_id,omitempty"`
      LastError       string             `json:"last_error,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt       time.Time          `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type Runner interface {
      RunID() string
      Events() iter.Seq2[*session.Event, error]
      Submit(Submission) error
      Cancel() CancelResult
      Close() error
  }
  type RunnerCompletionWaiter interface {
      WaitCompletion(context.Context) error
  }
  type Runtime interface {
      Run(context.Context, RunRequest) (RunResult, error)
      RunState(context.Context, session.SessionRef) (RunState, error)
  }
  type SessionControlPlane interface {
      ParticipantControlPlane
      HandoffController(context.Context, HandoffControllerRequest) (session.Session, error)
  }
  type SourceEvent struct {
      Canonical *session.Event
      Native    any
  }
  type SourceEventPublisher interface {
      PublishEvent(event *session.Event)
      PublishSourceEvent(event SourceEvent)
  }
  type SourceHandle interface {
      SourceEvents() iter.Seq2[SourceEvent, error]
  }
  type StreamProvider interface {
      Streams() stream.Service
  }
  type SubagentAnchor = delegation.Anchor
  type SubagentApprovalRequest struct {
      SessionRef   session.SessionRef       `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session      session.Session          `json:"session,omitempty"`
      TaskID       string                   `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      ParentCallID string                   `json:"parent_call_id,omitempty"`
      Agent        string                   `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Mode         string                   `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      ToolCall     EndpointApprovalToolCall `json:"tool_call,omitempty"`
      Options      []ApprovalOption         `json:"options,omitempty"`
  }
  type SubagentApprovalRequester interface {
      RequestSubagentApproval(context.Context, SubagentApprovalRequest) (ApprovalResponse, error)
  }
  type SubagentApprovalToolCall = EndpointApprovalToolCall
  type SubagentRunRequest = delegation.Request
  type SubagentRunResult = delegation.Result
  type SubagentRunner interface {
      Spawn(context.Context, SubagentSpawnContext, delegation.Request) (delegation.Anchor, delegation.Result, error)
      Continue(context.Context, delegation.Anchor, delegation.ContinueRequest) (delegation.Result, error)
      Wait(context.Context, delegation.Anchor, int) (delegation.Result, error)
      Cancel(context.Context, delegation.Anchor) error
  }
  type SubagentSpawnContext struct {
      SessionRef        session.SessionRef        `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session           session.Session           `json:"session,omitempty"`
      CWD               string                    `json:"cwd,omitempty"`
      TaskID            string                    `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      ParentCallID      string                    `json:"parent_call_id,omitempty"`
      Mode              string                    `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      ApprovalMode      string                    `json:"approval_mode,omitempty"`
      ApprovalRequester SubagentApprovalRequester `json:"-"`
      Streams           stream.Sink               `json:"-"`
  }
  type Submission struct {
      Kind         SubmissionKind      `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Text         string              `json:"text,omitempty"`
      DisplayInput string              `json:"display_input,omitempty"`
      ContentParts []model.ContentPart `json:"content_parts,omitempty"`
      Metadata     map[string]any      `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
  }
  type SubmissionKind string
  type TraceRecord struct {
      Event    LifecycleEvent `json:"event"`
      Status   TraceStatus    `json:"status"`
      At       time.Time      `json:"at"`
      Duration time.Duration  `json:"duration,omitempty"`
      Error    string         `json:"error,omitempty"`
  }
  type TraceSink interface {
      RecordTrace(TraceRecord)
  }
  type TraceStatus string

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/approval
  const (
      ModeAutoReview Mode = "auto-review"
      ModeManual     Mode = "manual"
  )
  const (
      ReviewStatusInProgress ReviewStatus = "in_progress"
      ReviewStatusApproved   ReviewStatus = "approved"
      ReviewStatusDenied     ReviewStatus = "denied"
      ReviewStatusTimedOut   ReviewStatus = "timed_out"
      ReviewStatusFailed     ReviewStatus = "failed"
  )
  const (
      StatusPending  Status = "pending"
      StatusApproved Status = "approved"
      StatusRejected Status = "rejected"
      StatusSelected Status = "selected"
  )
  const StateCurrentApprovalMode = "gateway.current_approval_mode"
  func (a ApproverAdapter) ReviewApproval(ctx context.Context, req Request) (Decision, error)
  func (a ReviewerAdapter) Decide(ctx context.Context, req Request) (Decision, error)
  func ClonePayload(in *Payload) *Payload
  func CloneReviewTrace(in *ReviewTrace) *ReviewTrace

  func CurrentModeOrDefault(state map[string]any, fallback Mode) Mode
  func FinalizeReviewResult(payload *Payload, result ReviewResult) ReviewResult
  func FormatReviewText(approved bool, risk string, authorization string, rationale string) string
  func NormalizeMode(mode string) Mode
  func NormalizeOptions(options []Option) []Option
  func NormalizeProtocolOptions(options []session.ProtocolApprovalOption) []Option
  func OptionIDs(options []Option) []string
  func PayloadFromRuntimeRequest(req agentsdk.ApprovalRequest) *Payload
  func ProtocolApprovalFromPayload(payload *Payload) *session.ProtocolApproval
  func ResolveReviewResult(payload *Payload, result ReviewResult) ReviewResult
  func ReviewErrorOutcome(err error) (ReviewStatus, string, bool)
  func ReviewID(prefix string, payload *Payload) string
  func ReviewTerminalStatus(result ReviewResult) ReviewStatus
  func RuntimeResponseFromFinalReview(result ReviewResult) agentsdk.ApprovalResponse
  func RuntimeResponseFromReview(payload *Payload, result ReviewResult) agentsdk.ApprovalResponse
  type Approver interface {
      Decide(context.Context, Request) (Decision, error)
  }
  type ApproverAdapter struct {
      Approver Approver
  }
  type Decision = ReviewResult
  type Mode string
  type ModelResolver interface {
      ResolveApprovalModel(context.Context, session.SessionRef) (model.LLM, error)
  }
  type Option struct {
      ID   string `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Kind string `json:"kind,omitempty"`
  }
  type Payload struct {
      ToolCallID         string                            `json:"tool_call_id,omitempty"`
      ToolName           string                            `json:"tool_name,omitempty"`
      ToolKind           string                            `json:"tool_kind,omitempty"`
      ToolTitle          string                            `json:"tool_title,omitempty"`
      ToolStatus         string                            `json:"tool_status,omitempty"`
      RawInput           map[string]any                    `json:"raw_input,omitempty"`
      RawOutput          map[string]any                    `json:"raw_output,omitempty"`
      Content            []session.ProtocolToolCallContent `json:"content,omitempty"`
      Reason             string                            `json:"reason,omitempty"`
      Justification      string                            `json:"justification,omitempty"`
      SandboxPermissions string                            `json:"sandbox_permissions,omitempty"`
      Status             Status                            `json:"status,omitempty"`
      Options            []Option                          `json:"options,omitempty"`
      ReviewID           string                            `json:"review_id,omitempty"`
      ReviewStatus       ReviewStatus                      `json:"review_status,omitempty"`
      ReviewText         string                            `json:"review_text,omitempty"`
      Risk               string                            `json:"risk,omitempty"`
      Authorization      string                            `json:"authorization,omitempty"`
      DecisionSource     string                            `json:"decision_source,omitempty"`
      ReviewTrace        *ReviewTrace                      `json:"review_trace,omitempty"`
  }
  type Request = ReviewRequest
  type ReviewRequest struct {
      SessionRef     session.SessionRef
      RunID          string
      TurnID         string
      Mode           Mode
      ReviewID       string
      Model          model.LLM
      Approval       *Payload
      RuntimeRequest agentsdk.ApprovalRequest
  }
  type ReviewResult struct {
      Approved       bool
      Outcome        string
      OptionID       string
      Risk           string
      Authorization  string
      Rationale      string
      DisplayText    string
      DecisionSource string
      Trace          *ReviewTrace
  }
  type ReviewStatus string
  type ReviewTrace struct {
      SessionID        string `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
      PromptEventID    string `json:"prompt_event_id,omitempty"`
      AssistantEventID string `json:"assistant_event_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type Reviewer interface {
      ReviewApproval(context.Context, ReviewRequest) (ReviewResult, error)
  }
  type ReviewerAdapter struct {
      Reviewer Reviewer
  }
  type Status string

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/errorcode
  const (
      Unknown            Code = "unknown"
      InvalidArgument    Code = "invalid_argument"
      NotFound           Code = "not_found"
      AlreadyExists      Code = "already_exists"
      Conflict           Code = "conflict"
      PermissionDenied   Code = "permission_denied"
      Unauthenticated    Code = "unauthenticated"
      FailedPrecondition Code = "failed_precondition"
      ResourceExhausted  Code = "resource_exhausted"
      RateLimited        Code = "rate_limited"
      Overloaded         Code = "overloaded"
      Timeout            Code = "timeout"
      Cancelled          Code = "cancelled"
      Unavailable        Code = "unavailable"
      Unsupported        Code = "unsupported"
      UnknownOutcome     Code = "unknown_outcome"
      Internal           Code = "internal"
  )
  func (e *Error) Error() string
  func (e *Error) ErrorCode() Code
  func (e *Error) Unwrap() error
  func CodeOf(err error) Code
  func Is(err error, code Code) bool
  func New(code Code, message string) *Error
  func Require(err error, expected Code) error
  func Wrap(code Code, message string, err error) *Error
  type Code string
  type Coder interface {
      ErrorCode() Code
  }
  type Error struct {
      Code    Code
      Message string
      Err     error
  }

  func CloneToolSpecs(in []ToolSpec) []ToolSpec
  func ContentPartFromPart(part Part) (ContentPart, bool)
  func ContentPartsFromParts(parts []Part) []ContentPart
  func DeriveRequiredCapabilities(declared Capabilities, stream bool, output *OutputSpec, toolCount int) Capabilities
  func ErrorCodeOf(err error) errorcode.Code
  func FunctionToolDefinitions(specs []ToolSpec) []ToolDefinition
  func IsBackpressureLLMError(err error) bool
  func IsContextOverflow(err error) bool
  func IsRetryableLLMError(err error) bool
  func MergeCapabilities(left, right Capabilities) Capabilities
  func MessageFromAssistantParts(text string, reasoning string, calls []ToolCall) Message
  func MessageFromContentParts(role Role, parts []ContentPart) Message
  func MessageFromTextAndContentParts(role Role, text string, parts []ContentPart) Message
  func MessageFromToolCalls(role Role, calls []ToolCall, text string) Message
  func MessageFromToolResponse(resp *ToolResponse) Message
  func NewFileRefPart(name, mimeType, uri, fileID, localRef string) Part
  func NewFunctionToolSpec(name, description string, parameters map[string]any) ToolSpec
  func NewJSONPart(raw json.RawMessage) Part
  func NewMediaPart(modality MediaModality, source MediaSource, mimeType, name string) Part
  func NewMessage(role Role, parts ...Part) Message
  func NewProviderExecutedToolSpec(provider, name string, details map[string]json.RawMessage) ToolSpec
  func NewReasoningMessage(role Role, text string, visibility ReasoningVisibility) Message
  func NewReasoningPart(text string, visibility ReasoningVisibility) Part
  func NewTextMessage(role Role, text string) Message
  func NewTextPart(text string) Part
  func NewToolResultJSONPart(toolUseID, name string, value map[string]any, isError bool) Part
  func NewToolUsePart(id, name string, input json.RawMessage) Part
  func NormalizeRetryConfig(cfg RetryConfig) RetryConfig
  func NormalizeToolUseInput(input json.RawMessage) json.RawMessage
  func NormalizeWebSearchRequest(req WebSearchRequest) WebSearchRequest
  func ParseToolCallArgs(raw string) (map[string]any, error)
  func ParseToolCallArgsRaw(raw string) (json.RawMessage, error)
  func PartFromContentPart(part ContentPart) Part
  func PartsFromContentParts(parts []ContentPart) []Part
  func ProviderRequestMetadataFromContext(ctx context.Context) (ProviderRequestMetadata, bool)
  func ProviderSeparatesCachedInput(provider string) bool
  func ProviderSeparatesCachedInputForUsage(provider string, payload map[string]any) bool
  func RetryDelayForAttempt(retry int, baseDelay, maxDelay time.Duration) time.Duration
  func StreamEventFromResponse(resp *Response) *StreamEvent
  func ToolSpecsFromDefinitions(defs []ToolDefinition) []ToolSpec
  func UserVisibleError(err error) string
  func ValidateCapabilities(modelName string, actual, required Capabilities) error
  func ValidateOutputSpec(spec *OutputSpec) error
  func WithProviderRequestMetadata(ctx context.Context, metadata ProviderRequestMetadata) context.Context
  func WithRetry(llm LLM, cfg RetryConfig) LLM
  type APIType string
  type AttemptReset struct {
      Attempt          int   `json:"attempt"`
      Retrying         bool  `json:"retrying"`
      MaxRetries       int   `json:"max_retries,omitempty"`
      RetryDelayMillis int64 `json:"retry_delay_ms,omitempty"`
  }
  type AuthType string
  type BackpressureError interface {
      Backpressure() bool
  }
  type Capabilities struct {
      ToolCalls             bool `json:"tool_calls,omitempty"`
      StructuredOutput      bool `json:"structured_output,omitempty"`
      Streaming             bool `json:"streaming,omitempty"`
      ParallelToolCalls     bool `json:"parallel_tool_calls,omitempty"`
      ReasoningContinuation bool `json:"reasoning_continuation,omitempty"`
      HostedTools           bool `json:"hosted_tools,omitempty"`
  }
  type Capability string
  type CapabilityError struct {
      Model      string
      Capability Capability
  }
  type CapabilityProvider interface {
      Capabilities() Capabilities
  }
  type ContentPart struct {
      Type     ContentPartType `json:"type"`
      Text     string          `json:"text,omitempty"`
      MimeType string          `json:"mime_type,omitempty"`
      Data     string          `json:"data,omitempty"`
      FileName string          `json:"file_name,omitempty"`
  }
  type ContentPartType string
  type ContextOverflowError struct {
      Cause error
  }
  type FileRefPart struct {
      Name     string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      MimeType string `json:"mime_type,omitempty"`
      URI      string `json:"uri,omitempty"`
      FileID   string `json:"file_id,omitempty"`
      LocalRef string `json:"local_ref,omitempty"`
  }
  type FinishReason string
  type FunctionToolSpec struct {
      Name        string         `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Description string         `json:"description,omitempty"`
      Parameters  map[string]any `json:"parameters,omitempty"`
      Strict      bool           `json:"strict,omitempty"`
  }
  type JSONPart struct {
      Value json.RawMessage `json:"value,omitempty"`
  }
  type LLM interface {
      Name() string
      Generate(context.Context, *Request) iter.Seq2[*StreamEvent, error]
  }
  type MCPToolSpec struct {
      Name   string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Server string `json:"server,omitempty"`
      Tool   string `json:"tool,omitempty"`
  }
  type MediaModality string
  type MediaPart struct {
      Modality MediaModality `json:"modality,omitempty"`
      Source   MediaSource   `json:"source"`
      MimeType string        `json:"mime_type,omitempty"`
      Name     string        `json:"name,omitempty"`
  }
  type MediaSource struct {
      Kind     MediaSourceKind `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Data     string          `json:"data,omitempty"`
      URI      string          `json:"uri,omitempty"`
      FileID   string          `json:"file_id,omitempty"`
      LocalRef string          `json:"local_ref,omitempty"`
  }
  type MediaSourceKind string
  type Message struct {
      Role   Role           `json:"role"`
      Parts  []Part         `json:"parts,omitempty"`
      Origin *MessageOrigin `json:"origin,omitempty"`
  }
  type MessageOrigin struct {
      Provider        string `json:"provider,omitempty"`
      Model           string `json:"model,omitempty"`
      RawFinishReason string `json:"raw_finish_reason,omitempty"`
      CreatedAt       string `json:"created_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type OutputMode string
  type OutputSpec struct {
      Mode            OutputMode     `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      JSONSchema      map[string]any `json:"json_schema,omitempty"`
      MaxOutputTokens int            `json:"max_output_tokens,omitempty"`
  }
  type OutputSpecError struct {
      Mode   OutputMode
      Detail string
  }
  type Part struct {
      Kind       PartKind        `json:"kind"`
      Text       *TextPart       `json:"text,omitempty"`
      Reasoning  *ReasoningPart  `json:"reasoning,omitempty"`
      ToolUse    *ToolUsePart    `json:"tool_use,omitempty"`
      ToolResult *ToolResultPart `json:"tool_result,omitempty"`
      Media      *MediaPart      `json:"media,omitempty"`
      JSON       *JSONPart       `json:"json,omitempty"`
      FileRef    *FileRefPart    `json:"file_ref,omitempty"`
  }
  type PartDelta struct {
      Index           int                        `json:"index,omitempty"`
      Kind            PartKind                   `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      TextDelta       string                     `json:"text_delta,omitempty"`
      InputDelta      string                     `json:"input_delta,omitempty"`
      Replay          *ReplayMeta                `json:"replay,omitempty"`
      ProviderDetails map[string]json.RawMessage `json:"provider_details,omitempty"`
  }
  type PartKind string
  type ProviderDefinedToolSpec struct {
      Name            string                     `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Provider        string                     `json:"provider,omitempty"`
      ProviderDetails map[string]json.RawMessage `json:"provider_details,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProviderExecutedToolSpec struct {
      Name            string                     `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Provider        string                     `json:"provider,omitempty"`
      ProviderDetails map[string]json.RawMessage `json:"provider_details,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProviderExecutedToolUsage interface {
      UsesProviderExecutedTools(*Request) bool
  }
  type ProviderRequestMetadata struct {
      SessionAffinity string
  }
  type ReasoningConfig struct {
      BudgetTokens int    `json:"budget_tokens,omitempty"`
      Effort       string `json:"effort,omitempty"`
  }
  type ReasoningPart struct {
      VisibleText     *string                    `json:"visible_text,omitempty"`
      Visibility      ReasoningVisibility        `json:"visibility,omitempty"`
      Replay          *ReplayMeta                `json:"replay,omitempty"`
      ProviderDetails map[string]json.RawMessage `json:"provider_details,omitempty"`
  }
  type ReasoningVisibility string
  type ReplayMeta struct {
      Provider string `json:"provider,omitempty"`
      Kind     string `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Token    string `json:"token,omitempty"`
  }
  type Request struct {
      Instructions []Part          `json:"instructions,omitempty"`
      Messages     []Message       `json:"messages,omitempty"`
      Tools        []ToolSpec      `json:"tools,omitempty"`
      Output       *OutputSpec     `json:"output,omitempty"`
      Reasoning    ReasoningConfig `json:"reasoning,omitempty"`
      Stream       bool            `json:"stream,omitempty"`
  }
  type Response struct {
      Message             Message        `json:"message"`
      StepComplete        bool           `json:"step_complete,omitempty"`
      TurnComplete        bool           `json:"turn_complete,omitempty"`
      Status              ResponseStatus `json:"status,omitempty"`
      FinishReason        FinishReason   `json:"finish_reason,omitempty"`
      RawFinishReason     string         `json:"raw_finish_reason,omitempty"`
      Usage               Usage          `json:"usage,omitempty"`
      Model               string         `json:"model,omitempty"`
      Provider            string         `json:"provider,omitempty"`
      ContextWindowTokens int            `json:"context_window_tokens,omitempty"`
  }
  type ResponseStatus string
  type RetryConfig struct {
      MaxRetries          int
      BaseDelay           time.Duration
      MaxDelay            time.Duration
      RateLimitMaxRetries int
      RateLimitBaseDelay  time.Duration
      RateLimitMaxDelay   time.Duration
  }
  type RetryExhaustedError struct {
      MaxRetries   int
      Backpressure bool
      Cause        error
  }
  type RetryableError interface {
      Retryable() bool
  }
  type Role string
  type StreamEvent struct {
      Type      StreamEventType `json:"type"`
      PartDelta *PartDelta      `json:"part_delta,omitempty"`
      Message   *Message        `json:"message,omitempty"`
      *Response
      RawProviderEvent json.RawMessage `json:"raw_provider_event,omitempty"`
      AttemptReset     *AttemptReset   `json:"attempt_reset,omitempty"`
  }
  type StreamEventType string
  type TextPart struct {
      Text string `json:"text"`
  }
  type ToolCall struct {
      ID               string `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name             string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Args             string `json:"args,omitempty"`
      ThoughtSignature string `json:"thought_signature,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolDefinition = FunctionToolSpec
  type ToolResponse struct {
      ID     string         `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name   string         `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Result map[string]any `json:"result,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolResultPart struct {
      ToolUseID string `json:"tool_use_id,omitempty"`
      Name      string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Content   []Part `json:"content,omitempty"`
      IsError   bool   `json:"is_error,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolSpec struct {
      Kind             ToolSpecKind              `json:"kind"`
      Function         *FunctionToolSpec         `json:"function,omitempty"`
      ProviderDefined  *ProviderDefinedToolSpec  `json:"provider_defined,omitempty"`
      ProviderExecuted *ProviderExecutedToolSpec `json:"provider_executed,omitempty"`
      MCP              *MCPToolSpec              `json:"mcp,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolSpecKind string
  type ToolUsePart struct {
      ID              string                     `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name            string                     `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Input           json.RawMessage            `json:"input,omitempty"`
      Replay          *ReplayMeta                `json:"replay,omitempty"`
      ProviderDetails map[string]json.RawMessage `json:"provider_details,omitempty"`
  }
  type Usage struct {
      PromptTokens      int `json:"prompt_tokens,omitempty"`
      CachedInputTokens int `json:"cached_input_tokens,omitempty"`
      CompletionTokens  int `json:"completion_tokens,omitempty"`
      ReasoningTokens   int `json:"reasoning_tokens,omitempty"`
      TotalTokens       int `json:"total_tokens,omitempty"`

      CostMicros int64 `json:"cost_micros,omitempty"`
  }
  type UserDisplayableError = display.UserDisplayableError
  type WebSearchAvailability interface {
      WebSearchUnavailableReason() string
  }
  type WebSearchRequest struct {
      Query      string `json:"query,omitempty"`
      MaxResults int    `json:"max_results,omitempty"`
  }
  type WebSearchResponse struct {
      Query    string            `json:"query,omitempty"`
      Provider string            `json:"provider,omitempty"`
      Model    string            `json:"model,omitempty"`
      Answer   string            `json:"answer,omitempty"`
      Results  []WebSearchResult `json:"results,omitempty"`
      Usage    Usage             `json:"usage,omitempty"`
  }
  type WebSearchResult struct {
      Title       string `json:"title,omitempty"`
      URL         string `json:"url,omitempty"`
      Snippet     string `json:"snippet,omitempty"`
      Source      string `json:"source,omitempty"`
      PublishedAt string `json:"published_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type WebSearcher interface {
      SearchWeb(context.Context, WebSearchRequest) (WebSearchResponse, error)
  }

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/policy
  const (
      ActionAllow       Action = "allow"
      ActionDeny        Action = "deny"
      ActionAskApproval Action = "ask_approval"
  )
  const (
      ProfileWorkspaceWrite = "workspace-write"

      MetadataPolicyProfile    = "policy_profile"
      MetadataLegacyPolicyMode = "policy_mode"
      MetadataExtraReadRoots   = "policy_extra_read_roots"
      MetadataExtraWriteRoots  = "policy_extra_write_roots"
  )
  func (e *DecisionError) Error() string
  func (e *DecisionError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *DecisionError) Unwrap() error
  func (e *ProfileError) Error() string
  func (e *ProfileError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *ProfileError) Unwrap() error
  func (e *ToolInputDecodeError) Error() string
  func (e *ToolInputDecodeError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *ToolInputDecodeError) Unwrap() error
  func (m NamedMode) DecideTool(ctx context.Context, input ToolContext) (Decision, error)
  func (m NamedMode) Name() string
  func (r *MemoryRegistry) Lookup(_ context.Context, name string) (Mode, bool, error)
  func (r *MemoryRegistry) Register(mode Mode) error
  func CallArgs(call tool.Call) (map[string]any, error)
  func CloneDecision(in Decision, err error) (Decision, error)
  func CloneModeOptions(in ModeOptions) ModeOptions
  func CloneToolContext(in ToolContext) ToolContext
  func NewMemory(modes ...Mode) (*MemoryRegistry, error)
  func NormalizeDecision(mode string, in Decision) (Decision, error)
  func NormalizeProfileName(profile string) string
  type Action string
  type Decision struct {
      Action      Action                    `json:"action,omitempty"`
      Reason      string                    `json:"reason,omitempty"`
      Constraints sandbox.Constraints       `json:"constraints,omitempty"`
      Metadata    map[string]any            `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      Approval    *session.ProtocolApproval `json:"approval,omitempty"`
  }
  type DecisionError struct {
      Mode   string
      Detail string
      Err    error
  }
  type MemoryRegistry struct {
      // contains filtered or unexported fields
  }
  type Mode interface {
      Name() string
      DecideTool(context.Context, ToolContext) (Decision, error)
  }
  type ModeOptions struct {
      WorkspaceRoot   string   `json:"workspace_root,omitempty"`
      TempRoot        string   `json:"temp_root,omitempty"`
      ExtraReadRoots  []string `json:"extra_read_roots,omitempty"`
      ExtraWriteRoots []string `json:"extra_write_roots,omitempty"`
      NetworkEnabled  *bool    `json:"network_enabled,omitempty"`
  }
  type NamedMode struct {
      ID     string
      Decide func(context.Context, ToolContext) (Decision, error)
  }
  type ProfileError struct {
      Profile string
      Detail  string
      Err     error
  }
  type Registry interface {
      Lookup(context.Context, string) (Mode, bool, error)
  }
  type ToolContext struct {
      Session session.Session    `json:"session"`
      State   map[string]any     `json:"state,omitempty"`
      Tool    tool.Definition    `json:"tool"`
      Call    tool.Call          `json:"call"`
      Sandbox sandbox.Descriptor `json:"sandbox"`
      Mode    string             `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      Options ModeOptions        `json:"options,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolInputDecodeError struct {
      Tool string
      Err  error
  }

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/runtime
  func (r *Runtime) AttachLiveRun(ctx context.Context, req agent.AttachLiveRunRequest) (agent.RunResult, error)
  func (r *Runtime) AttachParticipant(ctx context.Context, req agent.AttachParticipantRequest) (session.Session, error)
  func (r *Runtime) Compact(ctx context.Context, req CompactRequest) (CompactResult, error)
  func (r *Runtime) ContinueSubagentByHandle(
      ctx context.Context,
      ref session.SessionRef,
      handle string,
      prompt string,
      yield time.Duration,
  ) (taskapi.Snapshot, error)
  func (r *Runtime) DetachParticipant(ctx context.Context, req agent.DetachParticipantRequest) (session.Session, error)
  func (r *Runtime) PromptParticipant(ctx context.Context, req agent.PromptParticipantRequest) (agent.RunResult, error)
  func (r *Runtime) ResolveApproval(ctx context.Context, req agent.ResolveApprovalRequest) error
  func (r *Runtime) Run(
      ctx context.Context,
      req agent.RunRequest,
  ) (agent.RunResult, error)
  func (r *Runtime) RunState(
      ctx context.Context,
      ref session.SessionRef,
  ) (agent.RunState, error)
  func (r *Runtime) StartSubagent(
      ctx context.Context,
      ref session.SessionRef,
      agent string,
      prompt string,
      source string,
  ) (taskapi.Snapshot, error)
  func (r *Runtime) StartSubagentWithOptions(
      ctx context.Context,
      ref session.SessionRef,
      agent string,
      prompt string,
      source string,
      opts StartSubagentOptions,
  ) (taskapi.Snapshot, error)
  func (r *Runtime) Streams() stream.Service
  func (r *Runtime) WaitSubagentTask(
      ctx context.Context,
      ref session.SessionRef,
      taskID string,
      yield time.Duration,
  ) (taskapi.Snapshot, error)
  func ComputeUsageSnapshot(events []*session.Event, pendingEvents []*session.Event, contextWindow int, cfg CompactionConfig) compact.UsageSnapshot
  func New(cfg Config) (*Runtime, error)
  type CompactRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef
      Model      model.LLM
      Trigger    string
  }
  type CompactResult struct {
      Session   session.Session
      Compacted bool
      Event     *session.Event
      Usage     compact.UsageSnapshot
  }
  type CompactionConfig struct {
      Enabled                     bool
      WatermarkRatio              float64
      ForceWatermarkRatio         float64
      DefaultContextWindowTokens  int
      ReserveOutputTokens         int
      SafetyMarginTokens          int
      SegmentTokenBudget          int
      MaxSegmentDepth             int
      MaxRetryAttempts            int
      RetryBaseDelay              time.Duration
      RetryMaxDelay               time.Duration
      EstimatedPromptPrefixTokens int
  }
  type Config struct {
      Sessions                 session.Service
      AgentFactory             agent.AgentFactory
      RunIDGenerator           func() string
      Clock                    func() time.Time
      Compaction               CompactionConfig
      Compactor                compact.Engine
      PolicyRegistry           policy.Registry
      DefaultPolicyMode        string
      DefaultApprovalMode      string
      Controllers              controller.Backend
      ControllerContextRouter  controller.ContextRouter
      ControllerRecovery       controller.RecoveryCoordinator
      ControllerEventForwarder agent.ControllerEventForwarder
      TaskStore                task.Store
      Subagents                agent.SubagentRunner
      LifecycleInterceptors    []agent.LifecycleInterceptor
      TraceSink                agent.TraceSink
      Guardrails               []agent.GuardrailSpec
  }
  type Runtime struct {
      // contains filtered or unexported fields
  }
  type StartSubagentOptions struct {
      ApprovalRequester agent.ApprovalRequester
      ApprovalMode      string

      SpawnID string
  }
  var ErrEventStreamConsumed = errors.New("agent-sdk/runtime: runner event stream already has a consumer")

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/runtime/compact
  const (
      MetaKeyCompact         = "compact"
      CompactContractVersion = 1
      CompactNoticeLabel     = display.CompactNoticeLabel
      CompactFailureLabel    = display.CompactFailureNoticeLabel
  )
  const (
      UsageSourceProvider  UsageSource = "provider"
      UsageSourceEstimated UsageSource = "estimated"
  )
  func CompactEventDataFromEvent(event *session.Event) (CompactEventData, bool)
  func CompactEventDataValue(in CompactEventData) map[string]any
  func EventsAfterLatestCompact(events []*session.Event) []*session.Event
  func IsCompactEvent(event *session.Event) bool
  func LatestCompactEvent(events []*session.Event) (*session.Event, CompactEventData, bool)
  func PromptEventsFromLatestCompact(events []*session.Event) []*session.Event
  type CompactEventData struct {
      Revision             int      `json:"revision,omitempty"`
      ContractVersion      int      `json:"contract_version,omitempty"`
      SummarizedThroughID  string   `json:"summarized_through_id,omitempty"`
      SummarizedThroughSeq uint64   `json:"summarized_through_seq,omitempty"`
      Generator            string   `json:"generator,omitempty"`
      Trigger              string   `json:"trigger,omitempty"`
      SourceEventCount     int      `json:"source_event_count,omitempty"`
      TotalTokens          int      `json:"total_tokens,omitempty"`
      ContextWindowTokens  int      `json:"context_window_tokens,omitempty"`
      DiscoveredTools      []string `json:"discovered_tools,omitempty"`
  }
  type ContextWindowProvider interface {
      ContextWindowTokens() int
  }
  type Engine interface {
      Prepare(context.Context, Request) (Result, error)
      CompactOnOverflow(context.Context, Request, error) (Result, error)
  }
  type ForceEngine interface {
      Force(context.Context, Request, string) (Result, error)
  }
  type Request struct {
      Session       session.Session
      SessionRef    session.SessionRef
      Events        []*session.Event
      PendingEvents []*session.Event
      Model         model.LLM
  }
  type Result struct {
      Compacted    bool
      CompactText  string
      CompactEvent *session.Event
      PromptEvents []*session.Event
      Usage        UsageSnapshot
  }
  type TriggerDecision struct {
      ShouldCompact bool
      Reason        string
  }
  type UsageSnapshot struct {
      TotalTokens           int         `json:"total_tokens,omitempty"`
      ContextWindowTokens   int         `json:"context_window_tokens,omitempty"`
      EffectiveInputBudget  int         `json:"effective_input_budget,omitempty"`
      EstimatedDeltaTokens  int         `json:"estimated_delta_tokens,omitempty"`
      EstimatedPrefixTokens int         `json:"estimated_prefix_tokens,omitempty"`
      Source                UsageSource `json:"source,omitempty"`
      AsOfEventID           string      `json:"as_of_event_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type UsageSource string

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/runtime/controller
  const (
      CancelStatusCancelled        = agent.CancelStatusCancelled
      CancelStatusAlreadyCancelled = agent.CancelStatusAlreadyCancelled
  )
  func NormalizeAttachRequest(in AttachRequest) AttachRequest
  func NormalizeDetachRequest(in DetachRequest) DetachRequest
  func NormalizeHandoffRequest(in HandoffRequest) HandoffRequest
  func NormalizeParticipantPromptRequest(in ParticipantPromptRequest) ParticipantPromptRequest
  func NormalizeTurnRequest(in TurnRequest) TurnRequest
  type ApprovalOption = agent.ApprovalOption
  type ApprovalRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session    session.Session    `json:"session,omitempty"`
      Agent      string             `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Mode       string             `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      ToolCall   ApprovalToolCall   `json:"tool_call,omitempty"`
      Options    []ApprovalOption   `json:"options,omitempty"`
  }
  type ApprovalRequester interface {
      RequestControllerApproval(context.Context, ApprovalRequest) (ApprovalResponse, error)
  }
  type ApprovalResponse = agent.ApprovalResponse
  type ApprovalToolCall = agent.EndpointApprovalToolCall
  type AttachRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef         `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session    session.Session            `json:"session,omitempty"`
      Binding    session.ParticipantBinding `json:"binding,omitempty"`
      Agent      string                     `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Role       session.ParticipantRole    `json:"role,omitempty"`
      Source     string                     `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Label      string                     `json:"label,omitempty"`
  }
  type Backend interface {
      Activate(context.Context, HandoffRequest) (session.ControllerBinding, error)
      Deactivate(context.Context, session.SessionRef) error
      RunTurn(context.Context, TurnRequest) (TurnResult, error)
      Attach(context.Context, AttachRequest) (session.ParticipantBinding, error)
      PromptParticipant(context.Context, ParticipantPromptRequest) (TurnResult, error)
      Detach(context.Context, DetachRequest) error
  }
  type CancelResult = agent.CancelResult
  type CancelStatus = agent.CancelStatus
  type ContextRoute struct {
      Context agent.ContextTransfer `json:"context,omitempty"`
      SyncSeq uint64                `json:"sync_seq,omitempty"`
  }
  type ContextRouter interface {
      ControllerContext(context.Context, ControllerContextRequest) (ContextRoute, error)
      ParticipantContext(context.Context, ParticipantContextRequest) (ContextRoute, error)
      Checkpoint(context.Context, session.SessionRef, string) (uint64, error)
  }
  type ControllerContextRequest struct {
      SessionRef    session.SessionRef        `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session       session.Session           `json:"session,omitempty"`
      Controller    session.ControllerBinding `json:"controller,omitempty"`
      SinceSeq      uint64                    `json:"since_seq,omitempty"`
      ExcludeTurnID string                    `json:"exclude_turn_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type DetachRequest struct {
      SessionRef           session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session              session.Session    `json:"session,omitempty"`
      ParticipantID        string             `json:"participant_id,omitempty"`
      DelegationID         string             `json:"delegation_id,omitempty"`
      AttachmentGeneration string             `json:"attachment_generation,omitempty"`
      Source               string             `json:"source,omitempty"`
  }
  type HandoffRequest struct {
      SessionRef     session.SessionRef    `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session        session.Session       `json:"session,omitempty"`
      Agent          string                `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Source         string                `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Reason         string                `json:"reason,omitempty"`
      Context        agent.ContextTransfer `json:"context,omitempty"`
      ContextSyncSeq uint64                `json:"context_sync_seq,omitempty"`
  }
  type ParticipantContextRequest struct {
      SessionRef session.SessionRef         `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session    session.Session            `json:"session,omitempty"`
      Binding    session.ParticipantBinding `json:"binding,omitempty"`
  }
  type ParticipantPromptRequest struct {
      SessionRef        session.SessionRef    `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session           session.Session       `json:"session,omitempty"`
      TurnID            string                `json:"turn_id,omitempty"`
      ParticipantID     string                `json:"participant_id,omitempty"`
      Input             string                `json:"input,omitempty"`
      DisplayInput      string                `json:"display_input,omitempty"`
      DisplayTitle      string                `json:"display_title,omitempty"`
      ContentParts      []model.ContentPart   `json:"content_parts,omitempty"`
      Context           agent.ContextTransfer `json:"context,omitempty"`
      Stream            bool                  `json:"stream,omitempty"`
      Mode              string                `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      ApprovalRequester ApprovalRequester     `json:"-"`
  }
  type RecoveryCoordinator interface {
      ReattachController(context.Context, RecoveryRequest) (session.Session, error)
  }
  type RecoveryRequest struct {
      SessionRef    session.SessionRef `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session       session.Session    `json:"session,omitempty"`
      ExcludeTurnID string             `json:"exclude_turn_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type TurnHandle interface {
      Events() iter.Seq2[*session.Event, error]
      Cancel() CancelResult
      Close() error
  }
  type TurnRequest struct {
      SessionRef        session.SessionRef    `json:"session_ref,omitempty"`
      Session           session.Session       `json:"session,omitempty"`
      TurnID            string                `json:"turn_id,omitempty"`
      Input             string                `json:"input,omitempty"`
      ContentParts      []model.ContentPart   `json:"content_parts,omitempty"`
      Context           agent.ContextTransfer `json:"context,omitempty"`
      ContextSyncSeq    uint64                `json:"context_sync_seq,omitempty"`
      Stream            bool                  `json:"stream,omitempty"`
      Mode              string                `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      ApprovalRequester ApprovalRequester     `json:"-"`
  }
  type TurnResult struct {
      Handle    TurnHandle `json:"-"`
      UpdatedAt time.Time  `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  var ErrNotActive = errorcode.New(errorcode.FailedPrecondition, "agent-sdk/runtime/controller: controller is not active")

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/sandbox
  const (
      BackendHost     Backend = "host"
      BackendSeatbelt Backend = "seatbelt"
      BackendBwrap    Backend = "bwrap"
      BackendLandlock Backend = "landlock"
      BackendWindows  Backend = "windows"

      BackendWindowsElevated Backend = "windows-elevated"
      BackendCustom          Backend = "custom"
  )
  const (
      CapabilityFileSystem     Capability = "file_system"
      CapabilityCommandExec    Capability = "command_exec"
      CapabilityAsyncSessions  Capability = "async_sessions"
      CapabilityTTY            Capability = "tty"
      CapabilityNetworkControl Capability = "network_control"
      CapabilityPathPolicy     Capability = "path_policy"
      CapabilityEnvPolicy      Capability = "env_policy"
  )
  const (
      IsolationHost      Isolation = "host"
      IsolationProcess   Isolation = "process"
      IsolationContainer Isolation = "container"
  )
  const (
      NetworkInherit  Network = "inherit"
      NetworkEnabled  Network = "enabled"
      NetworkDisabled Network = "disabled"
  )
  const (
      PathAccessReadOnly  PathAccess = "read_only"
      PathAccessReadWrite PathAccess = "read_write"
      PathAccessHidden    PathAccess = "hidden"
  )
  const (
      PermissionDefault        Permission = "default"
      PermissionWorkspaceWrite Permission = "workspace_write"
      PermissionFullAccess     Permission = "danger_full_access"
  )
  const (
      RouteAuto    Route = ""
      RouteHost    Route = "host"
      RouteSandbox Route = "sandbox"
  )
  const (
      SetupScopeGlobal    SetupScope = "global"
      SetupScopeWorkspace SetupScope = "workspace"
  )
  const HostExecutionRequiresApprovalMessage = "Host execution requires approval. If still required, retry THIS SAME command once with sandbox_permissions=require_escalated and a non-empty justification. Do not escalate later similar commands by habit."
  const SandboxPermissionDeniedMessage = "Sandbox permission denied. Narrow the path or operation first. If still required, retry THIS SAME command once with sandbox_permissions=require_escalated and a justification that cites this failure. Do not escalate later similar commands by habit."
  func (e *CapabilityError) Error() string
  func (e *CapabilityError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *CommandExitError) Error() string
  func (e *CommandExitError) Unwrap() error
  func (f FuncRunner) Run(ctx context.Context, req CommandRequest) (CommandResult, error)
  func (s SetupStatus) Check(name string) (SetupCheck, bool)
  func (t LifecycleTarget) Close() error
  func CanonicalBackend(backend Backend) Backend
  func CloneDescriptor(in Descriptor) Descriptor
  func ClonePathRules(in []PathRule) []PathRule
  func CloneRequest(in CommandRequest) CommandRequest
  func CloneResult(in CommandResult, err error) (CommandResult, error)
  func CloneSessionRef(in SessionRef) SessionRef
  func CloneSessionStatus(in SessionStatus) SessionStatus
  func CloneSetupCheck(in SetupCheck) SetupCheck
  func CloneSetupStatus(in SetupStatus) SetupStatus
  func CloneStatus(in Status) Status
  func CloneTerminalRef(in TerminalRef) TerminalRef
  func ConstraintsRequestExplicitHost(in Constraints) bool
  func ContextWithPrepareProgress(ctx context.Context, fn PrepareProgressFunc) context.Context
  func DescriptorImpliesHostExecution(in Descriptor) bool
  func EffectiveConstraints(req CommandRequest) Constraints
  func IsCommandExit(err error) bool
  func IsSandboxACLRefreshDeniedText(text string) bool
  func IsSandboxCachePathEvidenceText(text string) bool
  func IsSandboxPermissionDeniedText(text string) bool
  func LifecycleTargetFor(cfg Config, current Runtime) (LifecycleTarget, error)
  func MarkCommandExit(err error) error
  func New(cfg Config) (Runtime, error)
  func NormalizeConfig(cfg Config) Config
  func NormalizeConstraints(in Constraints) Constraints
  func NormalizeSandboxPermissionError(err error) error
  func NormalizeSandboxPermissionFailure(result CommandResult, err error) (CommandResult, error)
  func NormalizeSandboxPermissionOutput(stream string, data []byte) []byte
  func NormalizeSandboxPermissionResult(result CommandResult) CommandResult
  func PrepareRuntime(ctx context.Context, runtime Runtime) error
  func RegisterBackendFactory(factory BackendFactory) error
  func RegisterBuiltInBackendFactory(factory BackendFactory)
  func RegisterBuiltInLifecycleFactory(factory LifecycleFactory)
  func RegisterLifecycleFactory(factory LifecycleFactory) error
  func RepairRuntime(ctx context.Context, runtime Runtime) error
  func ReportPrepareProgress(ctx context.Context, progress PrepareProgress)
  func ResetRuntime(ctx context.Context, runtime Runtime) error
  func SandboxPermissionDetail(result CommandResult, err error) (string, bool)
  func SelectionStatus(runtime Runtime) Status
  func ValidateCapabilities(descriptor Descriptor, required CapabilitySet) error
  type AsyncRunner interface {
      Runner
      Start(context.Context, CommandRequest) (Session, error)
      OpenSession(string) (Session, error)
  }
  type Backend string
  type BackendFactory interface {
      Backend() Backend
      Build(Config) (Runtime, error)
  }
  type BackendReporter interface {
      SupportedBackends() []Backend
      Status() Status
  }
  type Capability string
  type CapabilityError struct {
      Backend    Backend
      Capability Capability
  }
  type CapabilitySet struct {
      FileSystem     bool `json:"file_system,omitempty"`
      CommandExec    bool `json:"command_exec,omitempty"`
      AsyncSessions  bool `json:"async_sessions,omitempty"`
      TTY            bool `json:"tty,omitempty"`
      NetworkControl bool `json:"network_control,omitempty"`
      PathPolicy     bool `json:"path_policy,omitempty"`
      EnvPolicy      bool `json:"env_policy,omitempty"`
  }
  type CommandExitError struct {
      Err error
  }
  type CommandRequest struct {
      Command     string            `json:"command,omitempty"`
      Dir         string            `json:"dir,omitempty"`
      Timeout     time.Duration     `json:"timeout,omitempty"`
      IdleTimeout time.Duration     `json:"idle_timeout,omitempty"`
      TTY         bool              `json:"tty,omitempty"`
      Env         map[string]string `json:"env,omitempty"`
      Stdin       []byte            `json:"stdin,omitempty"`

      Permission Permission `json:"permission,omitempty"`
      RouteHint  Route      `json:"route_hint,omitempty"`
      Backend    Backend    `json:"backend,omitempty"`

      Constraints Constraints       `json:"constraints,omitempty"`
      OnOutput    func(OutputChunk) `json:"-"`
  }
  type CommandResult struct {
      Stdout   string  `json:"stdout,omitempty"`
      Stderr   string  `json:"stderr,omitempty"`
      Error    string  `json:"error,omitempty"`
      ExitCode int     `json:"exit_code,omitempty"`
      Route    Route   `json:"route,omitempty"`
      Backend  Backend `json:"backend,omitempty"`
  }
  type Config struct {
      CWD                 string    `json:"cwd,omitempty"`
      RequestedBackend    Backend   `json:"requested_backend,omitempty"`
      BackendCandidates   []Backend `json:"backend_candidates,omitempty"`
      FallbackInstallHint string    `json:"fallback_install_hint,omitempty"`
      HelperPath          string    `json:"helper_path,omitempty"`
      StateDir            string    `json:"state_dir,omitempty"`
      ReadableRoots       []string  `json:"readable_roots,omitempty"`
      WritableRoots       []string  `json:"writable_roots,omitempty"`
      ReadOnlySubpaths    []string  `json:"read_only_subpaths,omitempty"`
  }
  type Constraints struct {
      Route      Route      `json:"route,omitempty"`
      Backend    Backend    `json:"backend,omitempty"`
      Permission Permission `json:"permission,omitempty"`
      Isolation  Isolation  `json:"isolation,omitempty"`
      Network    Network    `json:"network,omitempty"`
      PathRules  []PathRule `json:"path_rules,omitempty"`
  }
  type Descriptor struct {
      Backend            Backend       `json:"backend,omitempty"`
      Isolation          Isolation     `json:"isolation,omitempty"`
      Capabilities       CapabilitySet `json:"capabilities,omitempty"`
      DefaultConstraints Constraints   `json:"default_constraints,omitempty"`
  }
  type DescriptorProvider interface {
      Describe() Descriptor
  }
  type FileSystem interface {
      Getwd() (string, error)
      UserHomeDir() (string, error)
      Open(path string) (*os.File, error)
      ReadDir(path string) ([]os.DirEntry, error)
      Stat(path string) (os.FileInfo, error)
      ReadFile(path string) ([]byte, error)
      WriteFile(path string, data []byte, perm os.FileMode) error
      Glob(pattern string) ([]string, error)
      WalkDir(root string, fn fs.WalkDirFunc) error
  }
  type FileSystemProvider interface {
      FileSystem() FileSystem
      FileSystemFor(Constraints) FileSystem
  }
  type FuncRunner func(context.Context, CommandRequest) (CommandResult, error)
  type Isolation string
  type LifecycleAction func(context.Context, Runtime) error
  type LifecycleFactory interface {
      Backend() Backend
      BuildLifecycle(Config) (Runtime, error)
  }
  type LifecycleTarget struct {
      Runtime Runtime
      Config  Config
      Current bool
      NoOp    bool
  }
  type Network string
  type OutputChunk struct {
      Stream string `json:"stream,omitempty"`
      Text   string `json:"text,omitempty"`
  }
  type PathAccess string
  type PathRule struct {
      Path   string     `json:"path,omitempty"`
      Access PathAccess `json:"access,omitempty"`
  }
  type Permission string
  type PreflightOptions struct {
      AllowNonElevatedRepair bool `json:"allow_non_elevated_repair,omitempty"`
  }
  type PreflightRuntime interface {
      Preflight(context.Context, PreflightOptions) error
  }
  type PreparableRuntime interface {
      Prepare(context.Context) error
  }
  type PrepareProgress struct {
      Phase   string `json:"phase,omitempty"`
      Message string `json:"message,omitempty"`
      Step    int    `json:"step,omitempty"`
      Total   int    `json:"total,omitempty"`
      Done    bool   `json:"done,omitempty"`
      Debug   bool   `json:"debug,omitempty"`
  }
  type PrepareProgressFunc func(PrepareProgress)
  type RefreshableRuntime interface {
      Refresh(context.Context) error
  }
  type RepairableRuntime interface {
      Repair(context.Context) error
  }
  type ResettableRuntime interface {
      Reset(context.Context) error
  }
  type Route string
  type Runner interface {
      Run(context.Context, CommandRequest) (CommandResult, error)
  }
  type Runtime interface {
      DescriptorProvider
      FileSystemProvider
      AsyncRunner
      SessionRefOpener
      BackendReporter
      Close() error
  }
  type SelectionStatusRuntime interface {
      SelectionStatus() Status
  }
  type Session interface {
      Ref() SessionRef
      Terminal() TerminalRef
      WriteInput(ctx context.Context, input []byte) error
      ReadOutput(ctx context.Context, stdoutMarker, stderrMarker int64) (stdout, stderr []byte, newStdoutMarker, newStderrMarker int64, err error)
      Status(ctx context.Context) (SessionStatus, error)
      Wait(ctx context.Context, timeout time.Duration) (SessionStatus, error)
      Result(ctx context.Context) (CommandResult, error)
      Terminate(ctx context.Context) error
  }
  type SessionRef struct {
      Backend   Backend `json:"backend,omitempty"`
      SessionID string  `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type SessionRefOpener interface {
      OpenSessionRef(SessionRef) (Session, error)
  }
  type SessionStatus struct {
      SessionRef
      Terminal      TerminalRef `json:"terminal,omitempty"`
      Running       bool        `json:"running,omitempty"`
      SupportsInput bool        `json:"supports_input,omitempty"`
      ExitCode      int         `json:"exit_code,omitempty"`
      StartedAt     time.Time   `json:"started_at,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt     time.Time   `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type SetupCheck struct {
      Name      string            `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Scope     SetupScope        `json:"scope,omitempty"`
      Current   bool              `json:"current,omitempty"`
      Required  bool              `json:"required,omitempty"`
      Reason    string            `json:"reason,omitempty"`
      Error     string            `json:"error,omitempty"`
      Version   int               `json:"version,omitempty"`
      Root      string            `json:"root,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt time.Time         `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
      Details   map[string]string `json:"details,omitempty"`
      Counts    map[string]int    `json:"counts,omitempty"`
  }
  type SetupScope string
  type SetupStatus struct {
      Required bool              `json:"required,omitempty"`
      Error    string            `json:"error,omitempty"`
      Details  map[string]string `json:"details,omitempty"`
      Counts   map[string]int    `json:"counts,omitempty"`
      Checks   []SetupCheck      `json:"checks,omitempty"`
  }
  type Status struct {
      RequestedBackend    Backend     `json:"requested_backend,omitempty"`
      ResolvedBackend     Backend     `json:"resolved_backend,omitempty"`
      FallbackToHost      bool        `json:"fallback_to_host,omitempty"`
      FallbackReason      string      `json:"fallback_reason,omitempty"`
      FallbackInstallHint string      `json:"fallback_install_hint,omitempty"`
      Setup               SetupStatus `json:"setup,omitempty"`
  }
  type TerminalRef struct {
      Backend    Backend `json:"backend,omitempty"`
      SessionID  string  `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
      TerminalID string  `json:"terminal_id,omitempty"`
  }

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/session
  const (
      ActorKindUser        ActorKind = "user"
      ActorKindController  ActorKind = "controller"
      ActorKindParticipant ActorKind = "participant"
      ActorKindTool        ActorKind = "tool"
      ActorKindSystem      ActorKind = "system"
  )
  const (
      ControlMutationPurposeApproval      ControlMutationPurpose = "approval"
      ControlMutationPurposeHandoff       ControlMutationPurpose = "handoff"
      ControlMutationPurposeWatchdog      ControlMutationPurpose = "watchdog"
      ControlMutationPurposeCoordinator   ControlMutationPurpose = "coordinator"
      ControlMutationPurposeParticipant   ControlMutationPurpose = "participant"
      ControlMutationPurposeLifecycle     ControlMutationPurpose = "session_lifecycle"
      ControlMutationPurposeConfiguration ControlMutationPurpose = "session_configuration"
      ControlMutationPurposeTest          ControlMutationPurpose = "test"
      ControlMutationPurposeSystemCommit  ControlMutationPurpose = "system_commit"
  )
  const (
      ControllerKindKernel ControllerKind = "kernel"
      ControllerKindACP    ControllerKind = "acp"
  )
  const (
      EventChildScopeSubagent    EventChildScope = "subagent"
      EventChildScopeParticipant EventChildScope = "participant"
  )
  const (
      EventPageCanonical EventPageVisibility = "canonical"

      EventPageClientReplay EventPageVisibility = "client_replay"

      EventPageAllDurable EventPageVisibility = "all_durable"
  )
  const (
      EventSchemaVersion = 1

      RunSchemaVersion = ExecutionJournalSchemaVersion
  )
  const (
      EventTypeUser        EventType = "user"
      EventTypeAssistant   EventType = "assistant"
      EventTypePlan        EventType = "plan"
      EventTypeToolCall    EventType = "tool_call"
      EventTypeToolResult  EventType = "tool_result"
      EventTypeParticipant EventType = "participant"
      EventTypeHandoff     EventType = "handoff"
      EventTypeCompact     EventType = "compact"
      EventTypeNotice      EventType = "notice"
      EventTypeLifecycle   EventType = "lifecycle"
      EventTypeSystem      EventType = "system"
      EventTypeContext     EventType = "context"
      EventTypeCustom      EventType = "custom"
  )
  const (
      ExecutionPrepared        ExecutionStatus = "prepared"
      ExecutionStarted         ExecutionStatus = "started"
      ExecutionWaitingApproval ExecutionStatus = "waiting_approval"
      ExecutionSucceeded       ExecutionStatus = "succeeded"
      ExecutionFailed          ExecutionStatus = "failed"
      ExecutionCancelRequested ExecutionStatus = "cancel_requested"
      ExecutionCancelled       ExecutionStatus = "cancelled"
      ExecutionInterrupted     ExecutionStatus = "interrupted"
      ExecutionUnknownOutcome  ExecutionStatus = "unknown_outcome"
  )
  const (
      JournalKindRun           JournalKind = "run"
      JournalKindTurn          JournalKind = "turn"
      JournalKindStep          JournalKind = "step"
      JournalKindToolExecution JournalKind = "tool_execution"
      JournalKindPauseToken    JournalKind = "pause_token"
  )
  const (
      MutationAuthorityRuntime MutationAuthority = "runtime"

      MutationAuthorityControl MutationAuthority = "control"
  )
  const (
      ParticipantKindACP      ParticipantKind = "acp"
      ParticipantKindSubagent ParticipantKind = "subagent"
  )
  const (
      ParticipantRoleSidecar   ParticipantRole = "sidecar"
      ParticipantRoleDelegated ParticipantRole = "delegated"
      ParticipantRoleObserver  ParticipantRole = "observer"
  )
  const (
      PauseTokenPending   PauseTokenStatus = "pending"
      PauseTokenResolved  PauseTokenStatus = "resolved"
      PauseTokenCancelled PauseTokenStatus = "cancelled"
  )
  const (
      ProtocolMethodSessionUpdate     = "session/update"
      ProtocolMethodRequestPermission = "session/request_permission"
      ProtocolMethodParticipantUpdate = "caelis/participant"
      ProtocolMethodControllerHandoff = "caelis/handoff"
      ProtocolMethodRuntimeLifecycle  = "caelis/lifecycle"
      ProtocolMethodContextCheckpoint = "caelis/context_checkpoint"
  )
  const (
      ProtocolUpdateTypeUserMessage  ProtocolUpdateType = "user_message_chunk"
      ProtocolUpdateTypeAgentMessage ProtocolUpdateType = "agent_message_chunk"
      ProtocolUpdateTypeAgentThought ProtocolUpdateType = "agent_thought_chunk"
      ProtocolUpdateTypeToolCall     ProtocolUpdateType = "tool_call"
      ProtocolUpdateTypeToolUpdate   ProtocolUpdateType = "tool_call_update"
      ProtocolUpdateTypePlan         ProtocolUpdateType = "plan"
      ProtocolUpdateTypePermission   ProtocolUpdateType = "request_permission"
  )
  const (
      SchemaKindEvent         SchemaKind = "event"
      SchemaKindJournal       SchemaKind = "journal"
      SchemaKindRun           SchemaKind = "run"
      SchemaKindToolExecution SchemaKind = "tool_execution"
      SchemaKindPauseToken    SchemaKind = "pause_token"
  )
  const (
      ToolExecutionPrepared        ToolExecutionStatus = "prepared"
      ToolExecutionApproved        ToolExecutionStatus = "approved"
      ToolExecutionStarted         ToolExecutionStatus = "started"
      ToolExecutionSucceeded       ToolExecutionStatus = "succeeded"
      ToolExecutionFailed          ToolExecutionStatus = "failed"
      ToolExecutionCancelRequested ToolExecutionStatus = "cancel_requested"
      ToolExecutionCancelled       ToolExecutionStatus = "cancelled"
      ToolExecutionUnknownOutcome  ToolExecutionStatus = "unknown_outcome"
  )
  const (
      VisibilityCanonical Visibility = "canonical"
      VisibilityUIOnly    Visibility = "ui_only"
      VisibilityOverlay   Visibility = "overlay"
      VisibilityMirror    Visibility = "mirror"

      VisibilityJournal Visibility = "journal"
  )
  const ExecutionJournalSchemaVersion = 1
  const ToolExecutionSchemaVersion = 1
  func (e *CommittedError) Error() string
  func (e *CommittedError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *CommittedError) Unwrap() error
  func (e *Event) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error
  func (e *EventConflictError) Error() string
  func (e *EventConflictError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *EventConflictError) Is(target error) bool
  func (e *EventValidationError) Error() string
  func (e *EventValidationError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *EventValidationError) Unwrap() error
  func (e *ExecutionTransitionError) Error() string
  func (e *ExecutionTransitionError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *JSONValueError) Error() string
  func (e *JSONValueError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *JSONValueError) Is(target error) bool
  func (e *JSONValueError) Unwrap() error
  func (e *LeaseConflictError) Error() string
  func (e *LeaseConflictError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *LeaseConflictError) Is(target error) bool
  func (e *ParticipantBindingConflictError) Error() string
  func (e *ParticipantBindingConflictError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *PauseTokenTransitionError) Error() string
  func (e *PauseTokenTransitionError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *RevisionConflictError) Error() string
  func (e *RevisionConflictError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *RevisionConflictError) Is(target error) bool
  func (e *SchemaVersionError) Error() string
  func (e *SchemaVersionError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (e *ToolExecutionTransitionError) Error() string
  func (e *ToolExecutionTransitionError) ErrorCode() errorcode.Code
  func (p *EventProtocol) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error
  func (p EventProtocol) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error)
  func (r *MigrationRegistry) Migrate(kind SchemaKind, source, target int, raw json.RawMessage) (json.RawMessage, error)
  func (r *MigrationRegistry) Register(kind SchemaKind, from, to int, migration SchemaMigration) error
  func ActorRefHasIdentity(ref ActorRef) bool
  func ApplyPreparedAppendToSession(activeSession *Session, prepared PreparedAppendEvents) bool
  func AuthorizeMutationGuard(active SessionLease, guard MutationGuard, now time.Time) error
  func CanonicalToolName(event *Event, update *ProtocolUpdate) string
  func CanonicalizeEvent(event *Event) *Event
  func CheckExpectedRevision(active Session, expected *uint64) error
  func CheckParticipantDelegation(activeSession *Session, participantID, expectedDelegation string) error
  func CloneActorRef(in ActorRef) ActorRef
  func CloneControllerBinding(in ControllerBinding) ControllerBinding
  func CloneEvent(in *Event) *Event
  func CloneEventChildOrigin(in EventChildOrigin) EventChildOrigin
  func CloneEventInvocation(in EventInvocation) EventInvocation
  func CloneEventProtocol(in EventProtocol) EventProtocol
  func CloneEventScope(in EventScope) EventScope
  func CloneEventTool(in EventTool) EventTool
  func CloneEvents(events []*Event) []*Event
  func CloneExecutionJournalEntry(in ExecutionJournalEntry) ExecutionJournalEntry
  func CloneParticipantBinding(in ParticipantBinding) ParticipantBinding
  func CloneParticipantBindings(in []ParticipantBinding) []ParticipantBinding
  func ClonePauseToken(in PauseToken) PauseToken
  func CloneProtocolApproval(in ProtocolApproval) ProtocolApproval
  func CloneProtocolToolCallContent(in []ProtocolToolCallContent) []ProtocolToolCallContent
  func CloneSession(in Session) Session
  func CloneSessionSummaries(items []SessionSummary) []SessionSummary
  func CloneState(state map[string]any) map[string]any
  func CloneToolExecution(in ToolExecution) ToolExecution
  func ContextWithRuntimeLease(ctx context.Context, lease SessionLease) context.Context
  func ContextWithoutRuntimeLease(ctx context.Context) context.Context
  func ControlMutationGuard(purpose ControlMutationPurpose) MutationGuard
  func ControlMutationGuardWithRuntimeLease(ctx context.Context, purpose ControlMutationPurpose) MutationGuard
  func ControlMutationMayOverlapRuntimeLease(purpose ControlMutationPurpose) bool
  func ControllerExecutor(binding ControllerBinding) ActorRef
  func DecodeSessionListCursor(encoded string) (SessionListCursor, error)
  func DefaultMigrationRegistry() *MigrationRegistry
  func EncodeSessionListCursor(cursor SessionListCursor) (string, error)
  func EventDisplayText(event *Event) string
  func EventMatchesPageVisibility(event *Event, visibility EventPageVisibility) bool
  func EventText(event *Event) string
  func EventToolProjection(event *Event) *EventTool
  func EventTypeOf(event *Event) EventType
  func EventValidationDetail(err error) string
  func ExecutionIdentity(key ExecutionKey) string
  func ExecutionRecordIdentity(record ExecutionRecord) string
  func FilterClientReplayEvents(events []*Event) []*Event
  func FilterEvents(events []*Event, limit int, includeTransient bool) []*Event
  func FilterReplayTranscriptEvents(events []*Event, includeTransient bool) []*Event
  func IsCanonicalHistoryEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsClientReplayEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsCommitted(err error) bool
  func IsInvocationVisibleEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsJournal(event *Event) bool
  func IsMainInvocationVisibleEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsMainReplayTraceEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsMirror(event *Event) bool
  func IsNotice(event *Event) bool
  func IsOverlay(event *Event) bool
  func IsReplayDialogueEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsSharedDialogueEvent(event *Event) bool
  func IsTransient(event *Event) bool
  func IsUIOnly(event *Event) bool
  func LastEventSeq(events []*Event) uint64
  func MarkMirror(event *Event) *Event
  func MarkNotice(event *Event, level string, text string) *Event
  func MarkOverlay(event *Event) *Event
  func MarkUIOnly(event *Event) *Event
  func MigrateEvent(in Event) (Event, error)
  func MigrateEventJSON(raw json.RawMessage) (json.RawMessage, error)
  func MigrateExecutionRecord(in ExecutionRecord) (ExecutionRecord, error)
  func MigrateToolExecution(in ToolExecution) (ToolExecution, error)
  func ModelMessageOf(event *Event) (model.Message, bool)
  func NewHandoffProtocol(handoff ProtocolHandoff) EventProtocol
  func NewMigrationRegistry() *MigrationRegistry
  func NewParticipantProtocol(participant ProtocolParticipant) EventProtocol
  func NormalizeEventPageRequest(req EventPageRequest) EventPageRequest
  func NormalizeExecutionKey(in ExecutionKey) ExecutionKey
  func NormalizeExecutionRecord(in ExecutionRecord) ExecutionRecord
  func NormalizeSessionRef(ref SessionRef) SessionRef
  func NormalizeToolExecution(in ToolExecution) ToolExecution
  func NormalizeUsageForDisplay(usage UsageSnapshot, provider string) UsageSnapshot
  func NoticeOf(event *Event) (EventNotice, bool)
  func PageEvents(events []*Event, req EventPageRequest) EventPage
  func ParticipantExecutor(binding ParticipantBinding) ActorRef
  func PendingApprovalMatches(current *Event, req SettlePendingApprovalRequest) bool
  func PlanPayloadOf(event *Event) *EventPlanPayload
  func PrepareAppendTransaction(req PrepareAppendTransactionRequest) (PreparedAppendTransaction, error)
  func PrepareEventsForAppend(req PrepareEventsForAppendRequest) (PreparedAppendEvents, error)
  func ProtocolHandoffOf(event *Event) *ProtocolHandoff
  func ProtocolParticipantOf(event *Event) *ProtocolParticipant
  func ProtocolPermissionOf(event *Event) *ProtocolApproval
  func ProtocolSessionUpdateType(event *Event) string
  func ProtocolSessionUpdateTypeOfProtocol(protocol *EventProtocol) string
  func ProtocolTextContent(text string) map[string]any
  func ProtocolToolCallContentOf(update *ProtocolUpdate) []ProtocolToolCallContent
  func ProtocolUpdateOf(event *Event) *ProtocolUpdate
  func ProtocolUpdateOfProtocol(protocol *EventProtocol) *ProtocolUpdate
